author_note: No Signature, from War Office.
collection_id: 819
collections:
- Letters Sent by the Secretary of the Navy to Federal Executive Agents (Letters to President, Secretary of State, Secretary of War, and Letters to
created: '2018-07-16T14:26:04+00:00'
day: '25'
description: Naval Constructor at Baltimore David Stodder informed that President of United States General George Washington desires that Joshua Humphreys, Captain Thomas Truxton, and Stodder develop a
  joint opinion on the matter of coppering a small part of the hull. As such Joshua Humphreys has been ordered to Baltimore to consult.
doc_types:
- Letterbook
